name: Sugar Cookies # 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together margarine, sugars, eggs, vanilla, and oil.
2. Sift dry ingredients together.
3. Gradually add the sifted dry mixture to the creamed mixture; mix well.
4. Chill the dough for at least two hours, but preferably overnight.
5. Roll into 1-inch balls and place on ungreased baking sheets, about 2 inches apart.
6. Flatten each ball with a glass dipped in sugar.
7. Bake at 350°F for 12-15 minutes. Do not overbake.
8. Yield: 4-5 dozen cookies. The cookies can be frosted with white icing and decorated with sugar crystals. Note: If the dough has been thoroughly chilled, these cookies will keep their shape very well.
